Finding.Description: LL-17 content has not been provided. Without LL-17 content, we cannot verify refinements, dependencies, or traceability (including interactions with LL-LOC-7.1) and naming consistency.
Finding.Solution: Provide LL-17.xml contents (or paste its requirements) so LL-17 refinements, dependencies, and traceability can be verified. After receipt, generate the full Findings/Implementations document for LL-17 and perform complete traceability validation, including LL-LOC-7.1 interactions.
